properties.title: 4-Bedroom Luxury Duplex, Estate Layout, Abuja
properties.description: Stunning 4-bedroom luxury duplex in a fully developed estate with paved roads, green spaces and mountain views. Newly built with POP ceilings, marble flooring, modern fixtures, and en-suite bathrooms throughout. Fully fenced with gate house and ample parking. Ready for immediate move-in. C of O available.

properties.title: Block of 6 Flats — Multi-Unit Investment Property
properties.description: Premium block of 6 self-contained flats in fast-growing Kubwa district. Each unit features 2 bedrooms, modern bathroom with rain shower, spacious living room with polished marble floors, POP ceilings, and recessed lighting. Perfect income-generating investment property with high rental demand. All 6 units ready for immediate occupancy.

properties.title: Carcass Duplex — Build to Your Taste
properties.description: 4-bedroom carcass duplex at roofing level — perfect for buyers who want to customise finishes to their exact taste. Stone coated roof already installed. Located in a rapidly developing area with excellent road access. Ideal opportunity to build your dream home at below market value. Deed of Assignment available.

properties.title: Morris Towne Estate — 8-Flat Block, Airport Road
properties.location: 4 Ali Ghanem Alhajri Str., Cadastral Zone E30, Lugbe West, Airport Road Abuja
properties.description: Positioned in Cadastral Zone E30, Lugbe West, this exceptional residential opportunity sits within one of Abuja's fastest-growing districts. Strategically located along the airport corridor near the Umaru Musa Yar'Adua Expressway, offering seamless connectivity — approximately 5-9 miles from Nnamdi Azikiwe International Airport. Features an exclusive block of 8 well-designed 2-bedroom flats, each with fully ensuite bedrooms and guest toilet. Located within a secure gated estate with high-profile residents. Individual purchases, multiple-unit acquisitions, wholesale purchase of entire block, or lease options available.
